title: Luffy Enters the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Nami, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Luffy, Jinbe as Pedro’s sacrifice opens the escape route while Luffy enters the mirror world to hold Katakuri back.
scene: Luffy separates himself from the crew to face Katakuri in the mirror world while Sanji moves toward the cake plan.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Luffy! It's me! Are you okay?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are still a few mirrors left on board, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: in the men's quarters, and the bathroom!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What are you saying?! We can't! You won't be able to come back!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: know, but I'll figure something out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WAAAAGH! The room's on fire! Water! Get water!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is BAD! Fire arrows are flying out of the mirror!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Everyone going to the ship! Follow me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They're coming after you! And I can't stop them all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I need to focus on this guy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everyone! All the mirrors on board, you need to...

summary: This section advances the Luffy vs Katakuri storyline with 33 dialogue beats. Luffy commits to stopping Katakuri while the others continue the escape and Sanji turns toward the cake that may save them.
